mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_feed_likes (feed_id, user_id, comment_id) VALUES (#{feedId}, #{userId}, #{commentId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sp_feed_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND feed_id = #{feedId}
DELETE FROM sp_feed_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sp_feed_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND feed_id = #{feedId}
SELECT * FROM sp_feed_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND comment_id = #{commentId}
